scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sips:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 55000 RTP/SAVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_32 inline:C9Xs6FPCPzw4WVGOZNx2BlxFz7DrXxlA/3if0Y5Q UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=rtcp:55001 a=sendrecv

INVITE sips:[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$2] To: [$1] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sips:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687638 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 55000 RTP/SAVP 0 a=rtpmap:8 PCMU/8000 a=rtcp:55001 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_32 inline:C9Xs6FPCPzw4WVGOZNx2BlxFz7DrXxlA/3if0Y5Q UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=sendonly

ACK sips:[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$2] To: [$1] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 ACK [routes] Contact: <sips:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: [len]

INVITE sips:[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$2] To: [$1] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: <sips:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687639 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 55002 RTP/SAVP 0 a=rtpmap:8 PCMU/8000 a=rtcp:55001 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_32 inline:TWcLJDMSok0/UnmZ7mqzPVC0qHDBMMJ7gD30fdBa UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP

ACK sips:[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$2] To: [$1] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 2 ACK [routes] Contact: <sips:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: [len]
